workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Topic / authority guides under /guides/)
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each guide in order (1 through 6).
After step 1, copy the returned keyword id into step 2.
After step 2, copy the returned page id into steps 3–5.
Put the full content brief in the keyword notes field — the AI pipeline uses it during generation.
Target ~1,800 words per page. YMYL: cite sources, medical reviewer block where applicable.

pages.title: IVF for Single Women in Europe: Top 3 Countries with Friendly Legislation (2026)

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: Topic authority guide (~1,800 words). Focus: why single women face barriers in some countries; top 3 legal-friendly destinations: Greece, Spain, Denmark. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why Single Women Face IVF Barriers in Europe, (2) Greece: Legal Requirements for Solo IVF, (3) Spain: Legal Requirements for Solo IVF, (4) Denmark: Legal Requirements for Solo IVF, (5) Notarial Deeds and Consent Forms Explained, (6) Sperm Donor Anonymity Rules by Country, (7) Clinics Specializing in Single Women IVF, (8) Step-by-Step Legal Process for International Patients, (9) FAQ. Link internally to /guides/greece-ivf-guide, /guides/spain-ivf-guide, /guides/greece/athens-ivf-guide, /guides/spain/barcelona-ivf-guide. YMYL: cite national fertility law sources. Goal: establish MedCover as authority on legal-friendly destinations.
